final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero banner, brand flagship store homepage
Primary request: fashion editorial shot of a model in a camel wool coat walking on a leaf-covered street at sunset
Scene/backdrop: autumn street covered with fallen golden and brown leaves, soft bokeh city background
Subject: elegant model wearing oversized camel wool coat, relaxed confident stride, hair gently blown by breeze
Style/medium: fashion photography, editorial campaign aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium full-body shot, walking pose with natural movement, 85mm portrait lens
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour backlight, soft rim light on silhouette, cozy and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: warm camel, burnt orange, golden yellow, soft cream, muted browns
Materials/textures: thick woven wool texture, crisp fallen leaves, soft natural fabric drape
Constraints: maintain warm premium brand feel suitable for luxury autumn/winter collection
Avoid: harsh flash, cold blue tones, cluttered background, plastic-looking fabric, oversaturated colors
